description: Add API key generation, storage, and validation so agents using the funding-search plugin can authenticate. Keys are created by humans in a settings UI and passed to agents via openclaw.json plugin config.

context.database: Vercel Postgres via Drizzle ORM (already configured)

userStories.title: API key generation endpoint
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I can generate an API key so my agent can authenticate with the funding search plugin.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/keys creates a new API key tied to the authenticated user
Returns the full key ONCE at creation time (stored as hash afterward)

userStories.title: API key listing and revocation UI
userStories.description: As a user, I can view my keys and revoke them from a settings page.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/keys returns list of user's keys (name, created_at, last_used_at, masked key)
DELETE /api/keys/:id revokes a key (soft delete via revoked_at timestamp)
Simple UI at /settings/keys showing active keys with revoke buttons

userStories.title: API key validation middleware
userStories.description: As a system, I can validate API keys on protected endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Hashes incoming key and compares against stored hashes
Returns 401 with clear error message on invalid/missing key

userStories.title: Database schema for API keys
userStories.description: As a system, I store API keys securely in Vercel Postgres.
acceptanceCriteria: Add api_keys table to Drizzle schema
Columns: id, user_id, key_hash, name, created_at, last_used_at, revoked_at
Foreign key to existing user table
Index on key_hash for fast lookups

POST /api/keys.description: Generate a new API key for the authenticated user

GET /api/keys.description: List all API keys for the authenticated user

definitionOfDone: User can generate an API key from /settings/keys
Key is displayed once and stored as hash
Agent can pass key in openclaw.json plugin config
User can see list of their keys with last-used timestamps
User can revoke a key and it immediately stops working
